name: docker-restart-safe
description: Safely restart Docker containers with mandatory confirmation and state checks.

navig-commands.name: restart
navig-commands.confirmation_msg: ⚠️  WARNING: You are about to restart container '{container_name}'. This may cause downtime.

navig-commands.name: down
navig-commands.description: Stop and remove resources defined in a compose file.
navig-commands.confirmation_msg: ⚠️  DESTRUCTIVE: This will stop all services in '{compose_file}' and remove networks.
